title: Delhi High Court directs police to locate man repeatedly threatening court via VC; bars him from leaving India
description: The Delhi High Court on March 23 directed Delhi Police to trace the location of one Adeeshwar Singhal (contemnor) against whom criminal contempt of court proceedings have been initiated for making repeated threats against judges [Court on its own motion v Adeeshwar Singhal]. The Court also restrained Singhal from leaving the country.A Division Bench of Justices Navin Chawla and Ravinder Dudeja passed the order after Singhal appeared before the Court via video confer
